title: selaginella ganguliana
intro: Selaginella ganguliana, also known as Indian spikenard, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to the Himalayan region. Traditionally, it has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Selaginella ganguliana can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
